title: GarphQL - Try-it-yourself Result not as expected

posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have some issues when trying the GraphQL in monday.com
Board A - 1877686330
Board B - 2519762415 (duplicate board of Board A)

Issue 1:
The items in both boards are the same, but the result doesn’t return any items for Board B if I change the board_id (I have checked the column_ids, they are still the same):

query {
    items_by_multiple_column_values (board_id: 1877686330, column_id: "statut77", column_values: ["OUI"]) {
        id
        name
        column_values(ids: ["statut77","personnes8","demandeur4"]) {
    		  id
                  text 
                  additional_info 
        } 
    }
}

Result:
Board A

image1920×325 22.3 KB

Board B

image1272×230 12 KB

Issue 2:
The filtering doesn’t seem to work:
The items with status “A VALIDER” and “A CORRIGER” are returned in the list although the query is filtered by “OUI”

image1858×814 45.3 KB

When I filtered by “A VALIDER” and “A CORRIGER”, the result return nothing:

image1261×212 10.3 KB

Can you guys please help to check what is wrong here?

Thanks!

Br, YarHuoy

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @yarhuoy

Reading this one https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/items-by-column-values-queries is mentioning the column_type. I miss that one in your query. Could that be the reason?

posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI @basdebruin ,

But this shouldn’t cause the query to be working on Board A but not Board B right?
I’m using this: Items By Multiple Column Values

Is it possible that there is a “temporary table” on Monday side which is used for filtering purpose and the “table” is not up to date?

Br, Yar Huoy

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, but trying wouldn’t hurt I guess

posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI @basdebruin

As expected, this doesn’t work either

image1368×288 20.8 KB

Br, Yar Huoy

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: That is weird, I seem to have the same issue in the playground. Maybe something for the monday support team?

posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @basdebruin ,

How can I direct to them?

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
